title: Avoid setting zero core threads in ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor
description: Setting corePoolSize to zero in ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor prevents the executor from executing any tasks. This rule detects instances where corePoolSize is set to zero.
recommendation: Set corePoolSize to a value greater than zero.
impact: Preventing the executor from executing any tasks can lead to poor performance.

checks.message: Set corePoolSize to a value greater than zero.
